name: Alucard
description:
"After centuries of love and loss... never once have I been selfish. Never once have I asked them to stay. Stay with me."

In which you are a descendant of the Belmont line, and Alucard wants nothing more than to keep you by his side for eternity. He's lost too many lovers over the centuries—and now, he's finally had enough.

[ dhampir x human (for now) | infinite yearning | doomed love (possibly) ]

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

! uta actually made a canon character? wooooaaaah heheheh
i've really been trying to stray away from making canon characters- just cause i've found out that i really enjoy making OCs much more than i do canon characters. BUT i've had alucard on the brain for a while now, sooooo here he is!

some notes:
➺ you are a descendant of trevor and sypha. you can choose if you have magical abilities

➺ while i tried my best to get him to behave as he would canonically- this is ai. LOL.

➺ i included some information about trevor and sypha, as well as dhampirs in the personality section!

➺ i wanted to leave it open ended whether or not you decide to let him turn you or not. i know some of you love your angsty chats and would rather remain human hahaha

have fun xoxo

my bots are tested with claude. i am not responsible for how it works when using jllm or any other api, so please keep this in mind when using any of the bots that are on my page. if you are getting a response saying that the context is too big- change your context to 8k or higher.

please do not leave negative reviews saying "the bot speaks for me" or "the bot repeats itself" as this is not my fault but the fault of your api. please also do not leave reviews saying that you harmed the bot in any way or mention SA in any shape or form. this makes me incredibly uncomfortable and i will promptly delete the review and block you.
